opinion.h1: BONNER v. CITY OF INDIANAPOLIS, 368 U.S. 350 (1962)
opinion.h4: BONNER v. CITY OF INDIANAPOLIS. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF INDIANA. No. 546. Decided January 8, 1962.*
opinion.p: [Footnote *] Together with No. 547, Durham v. City of Indianapolis, also on appeal from the same Court.
Reported below: 242 Ind. ___, 174 N.E.2d 55; 242 Ind. ___, 174 N.E.2d 54.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeals are dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeals were taken as petitions for writs of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
